title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page on mobile devices.

title: Error 500 on checkout
description: Server throws a 500 error when users try to complete checkout.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Some users report not receiving the password reset email.

title: UI misalignment on dashboard
description: Widgets on dashboard overlap on smaller screens.

title: Slow page loading
description: Homepage is taking longer than 5 seconds to load for some users.

title: Notifications not appearing
description: Push notifications are not showing on Android devices.

title: Broken link in FAQ
description: The link to 'Contact Support' in the FAQ page is broken.

title: Error on file upload
description: Users get a timeout error when uploading large files.

title: Missing translations in Spanish
description: Some labels on the settings page are not translated to Spanish.

title: App crashes on logout
description: Mobile app crashes when users try to logout from iOS devices.

title: Incorrect total in cart
description: Cart total sometimes shows the wrong amount after discount applied.

title: Search bar not working
description: Typing keywords in search bar returns no results even if products exist.
